notes: Nordic system block diagram with a large chip frame, top RAM slices, GPIO, CPU/debug blocks, AHB multilayer, AHB-to-APB bridge, APB bus spine, and dense peripheral columns.

Includes repeated EasyDMA sub-blocks, repeated master/slave arrow labels, external pin arrows on both sides, wireless/security blocks, flash/code blocks, and audio/USB/NFC/QSPI/UART/SPI/I2C peripherals.
Useful for validating repeated components, stacked internal sublabels, monochrome diagrams, dense connector arrows, bus role labels, and many small external edge terminals.
